rationale: Review 2 uniquely flags the bundling of finiteType and geomReduced in AffineAlgGroup (directly visible in the diff at lines 34–37), which Review 1 explicitly approves as a legitimate foundation; if a roadmap 'Don't bundle' directive exists, acting on Review 1 entrenches a misdesigned base class while Review 2 fixes it alongside the shared findings on IsUnipotent and the True-stub classes.
